summary: Comprehensive testing of College Admission AI Platform completed. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully including 4-step profile form, dashboard with recommendations, college comparison, wishlist, AI chat, and branch roadmap features.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: App.js has unused imports (useEffect, Line) - ESLint warnings present but not blocking
Minor: server.py line 30 has default value for MONGO_URL which should be avoided per best practices
seed_data_creation: 25 colleges already seeded in MongoDB via /app/scripts/seed_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working: Home page, 4-step profile form, recommendations with probability scoring (Safe/Moderate/Ambitious), bar chart, college comparison, wishlist add/remove, AI chat (GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM), branch career roadmap. Backend uses real AI - no mocked APIs. Test profile: rank=5000, category=General, branch=Computer Science returns 15 recommendations (11 Safe, 4 Moderate).

backend_apis: POST /api/recommendations - Returns colleges with probability scores
frontend_flows: Home page with Get Started button
College cards with probability badges, AI insights, fees, placements
AI Chat widget with real responses
